ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle class */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Size of the vehicle's engine in liters */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the vehicle's engine */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmission type of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type of the vehicle */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the fuel tank in liters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in kilograms */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the vehicle in Newton-meters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the vehicle record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the vehicle record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_class_id") REFERENCES vehicle_classes ("vehicle_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the manufacturer */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the manufacturer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the manufacturer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "vehicle_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vehicle class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the vehicle class record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the vehicle class record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transmission type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the transmission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the transmission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fuel type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the fuel type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the fuel type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiencies" (
  "fuel_efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "city_efficiency" REAL /* City fuel efficiency in L/100 km */,
  "highway_efficiency" REAL /* Highway fuel efficiency in L/100 km */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption in L/year */,
  "combined_efficiency" REAL /* Combined city and highway fuel efficiency in L/100 km */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the fuel efficiency record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the fuel efficiency record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiencies_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "co2_emission" REAL /* CO2 emission in g/km */,
  "nox_emission" REAL /* NOx emission in g/km */,
  "pm_emission" REAL /* Particulate matter emission in g/km */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the emission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the emission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the research team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the research team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the team member record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the team member record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
